metadata.overview: Controls Bitdeer D40 immersion containers. The worker embeds the MQTT broker the container publishes into — reads are served from the last published state.

telemetry.name: snap
telemetry.description: Full structured snapshot (stats + config), same shape the legacy metrics pull returned.

commands.name: switchContainer
commands.description: Turn the whole container on or off.

commands.name: switchSocket
commands.description: Switch PDU sockets: array of [pduIndex, socketIndex, enabled] tuples.

commands.name: switchCoolingSystem
commands.description: Turn the cooling system on or off.

commands.name: setAirExhaustEnabled
commands.description: Enable or disable the air exhaust.

commands.name: setTemperatureSettings
commands.description: Set temperature thresholds ({ coldOil, hotOil, coldWater, hotWater, coldOilSet, exhaustFan, pressureAlarm }).

troubleshooting: Reads come from the container's MQTT publishes — a fresh worker reports offline until the container publishes state.
If status stays offline, verify the container can reach the worker's broker port.

errors.E_OFFLINE: No recent MQTT state from the container
